name: gridphp/gridphp-community
description: Interactive demo showcase for GridPHP. Includes pre-loaded sample datasets and production-ready CRUD grid configurations.

post-create-project-cmd:
@php -r '$nix=strtoupper(substr(PHP_OS,0,3))!=="WIN";$fg=$nix?"\033[30m":"";$bg=$nix?"\033[42m":"";$rs=$nix?"\033[0m":"";$L=["To view all interactive demos locally, execute:","","👉  php -S localhost:8000","","Then open your browser and navigate to http://localhost:8000"];$t="GridPHP Demos Installed Successfully!";$mw=strlen($t)+4;foreach($L as $l){$mw=max($mw,mb_strlen($l)+2);}printf("
%s

",$fg.$bg.str_pad(" ".$t." ",$mw," ",STR_PAD_BOTH).$rs);foreach($L as $l){echo " ".$l."
";}echo "
";'
